name: GUIDED THERAPEUTICS INC
business: Guided Therapeutics focuses on sales and marketing of the LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan, a non-invasive cervical cancer detection device using biophotonics. It targets developing-world screening and developed-world triage after Pap or HPV tests.
namedSuppliers: Newmars Technologies (final assembly and CE Mark)
vendor specializing in injection molding of plastic medical products (single-use cervical guides)

exposures.sentence: Our primary focus is the sales and marketing of our LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan non-invasive cervical cancer detection device.

LuViva is designed to identify cervical cancers and precancers painlessly, non-invasively and at the point of care by scanning the cervix with light, then analyzing the reflected and fluorescent light.
We believe our non-invasive cervical cancer detection technology can be applied to the early detection of other cancers as well.

catalysts.sentence: We currently expect to submit the application to the FDA in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: NMPA approval for LuViva in China
catalysts.sentence: Based on current expectations, a manufacturing inspection could occur in May 2026, with potential approval in the third quarter of 2026.
The clinical study is expected to involve about 800 patients, take less than six months to complete and will be funded by the MOH... the study concluded in the first half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: 660,000 new cervical cancer cases in 2022 worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: According to the most recent data published by the World Health Organization (WHO), cervical cancer is the fourth most frequent cancer in women worldwide, with an estimated 660,000 new cases in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: approximately 2.0 billion women aged 15+ eligible for screening in developing world
tamClaims.sentence: In the developing world, there are approximately 2.0 billion women aged 15 and older who are potentially eligible for screening with LuViva.

tamClaims.claim: 50-60 million Pap tests annually in the US at $125-$450 per exam
tamClaims.sentence: Currently, about 50-60 million Pap tests are given annually in the United States and, combined with a pelvic exam as the standard of care, have an average price in the range of approximately $125 - $450 per exam.

tamClaims.claim: about two million colposcopy exams annually in US and Europe, average cost $3,300 in US
tamClaims.sentence: There are about two million colposcope examinations annually in the United States and Europe... the average cost of a colposcopy examination with biopsy in the United States is currently $3,300.

tamClaims.claim: 155 million screening candidates in Turkey, Indonesia, and Central/Eastern Europe
tamClaims.sentence: We are actively working with distributors in the following countries to implement government-sponsored screening programs: Turkey, Indonesia and several countries in Central and Eastern Europe. The number of screening candidates in those countries is approximately 155 million.

tamClaims.claim: 349,000 deaths in 2022, projected to rise to over 411,000 by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: In 2022, GLOBOCAN, the international cancer tracking agency, estimated that approximately 349,000 women died from cervical cancer... GLOBOCAN projects the global deaths to rise significantly to over 411,000 deaths annually by 2030.
